author: amartini
text:
I have been using gallery-dl successfully on imx.to individual links, but now I updated it (lost my vps and had to redo it, so I don't know the previous version I was using) and it is downloading random images, probably from ads on the site. The previous version downloaded only the main image.  
Is there a way to fix this or filter those images?

author: mikf
text:
Could you post an example link where it downloads the wrong file?

Tests still complete successfully and the few imx.to galleries from vipergirls I tested with download the correct files as well.

> but now I updated it

The last real change to the imx.to code was in 2018 ([564e12c](https://github.com/mikf/gallery-dl/commit/564e12ca8f5eb3bbe2e0863399528b60fbce081a)), so I doubt you updating is to blame.

author: amartini
text: Guess I found it. My script was running gallery-dl "r:url" instead of gallery-dl "url". Not sure why this was working fine before.
